title: OCR Error Detection Hotfix
body:
Fix input handling of error detection model: 
- Segment length is automatically handled by tokenizer, and is by `#tokens`, not `#chars`, removing the splitting logic inside `marker`
- Join lines using `\n`

step_plan.summary: Fix OCR error detection input preparation by joining lines with newlines and removing Marker-side character-length cropping, relying on the tokenizer/model to handle segmenting by token count. Validate downstream layout-merge behavior continues to correctly consume model labels for OCR fallback decisions.

steps.operation: Update OCR error detection text construction to preserve line boundaries and remove character-based segment cropping
steps.reason: The Surya `OCRErrorPredictor`/tokenizer handles segmentation by token count; Marker-side sampling by character length can truncate important context and contradicts the model’s expected input handling. Joining extracted line texts with `\n` preserves layout/line breaks, which is important OCR-signal for error detection.
steps.side_effects: Longer strings will be sent to the predictor (potentially higher compute), but truncation should be handled by the tokenizer/model. Any behavior previously influenced by `error_model_segment_length` (character cropping) will change; review logs/metrics for OCR fallback rate shifts. Ensure batching still aligns 1:1 with pages.

steps.operation: Verify merge flow remains consistent with the updated OCR error detection inputs (labels alignment, batching assumptions, and decision thresholds) and adjust only if necessary
steps.reason: `merge_blocks` consumes labels produced by `surya_ocr_error_detection` to decide pdftext-vs-OCR behavior. Even if no code change is required, it must be validated that removing segment-length cropping doesn’t break assumptions about label counts/order or downstream decision logic.
steps.side_effects: If any implicit assumptions exist (e.g., fixed-size segments or predictable truncation), they may surface as misalignment bugs. May require updating or adding a regression test to ensure the same pages map to the same label indices after the input preparation change.
